title: Blossoming Kingdoms
description: High Fantasy & Colonial Kingdoms Surrounded by Fields of Hibiscus~
body:
## Welcome to a world you can mold to your liking! 

Blossoming Kingdoms is a Medieval Pre-Industrial world.. but you can change that! Cultivate your own corner of this vast world with your own [MineColony](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecolonies), and develop your own industrial factories to **expand, expand expand** with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)!

**Establish Colonies**

Or if you'd rather avoid the loud machinery, there's plenty of books to stick your nose into... some might even teach you the [Arcane](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) or [Occult](https://modrinth.com/mod/occultism)!

**Indulge the Mythical & Magical**

But, if none of that suits your fancy, you can always run off to explore this vast expanse, carrying your gear in a [cart](https://modrinth.com/mod/astikorcarts-redux) across the rocky hills... there's plenty of dungeons and evil creatures to find and conquer! Be careful though, some are incredibly difficult, like the powerful bosses of [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) or the monstrous beasts of [Ice & Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iceandfire-ce), but the gear earned is well worth the challenge!

**Explore the World <3**


<details>
<summary>More In-Depth List of the Mods Included</summary>

- [Minecolonies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecolonies)
